channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Key Players to Watch in the Soweto Derby: Pirates vs Chiefs
item.description: The upcoming Soweto Derby between Orlando Pirates and Kaizer Chiefs is set to be a thrilling encounter, as both teams battle for a crucial spot in the PSL log. Pirates will be looking to continue thei...

item.title: Swiss Air Flight Aborts Takeoff in Delhi, Engine Fire Injures Six
item.description: A Swiss International Air Lines flight from Delhi to Zurich had a bit of a scare on Sunday, ya, when its engine conked out and caught fire during takeoff. Thankfully, the pilots were quick on their fe...

item.title: Abandoned Dogs Struggle to Survive on Shell Island in Cebu
item.description: On Shell Island, Cebu, dozens of abandoned dogs battle hunger and harsh conditions, largely ignored by those passing by. Dondon Demicillio, a local caretaker, has been feeding the dogs for nearly seve...

item.title: Sooryavanshi Sets New Record as Youngest to Reach 1,000 T20 Runs with Quick Fire 36-Ball Century
item.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi made history by becoming the youngest player and fastest in terms of balls faced to reach 1,000 runs in T20 cricket. The 15-year-old's remarkable feat occurred during the Indian P...

item.title: Community Leaders Urge Swift Return of Displaced Residents from Tirah Valley
item.description: On Saturday, the Bara Siyasi Ittehad held a jirga addressing the pressing concerns of displaced residents from Tirah Valley in Khyber tribal district. The gathering included prominent local leaders su...

item.title: STACX: Free CRM App Designed Specifically for Content Creators
item.description: Content creators often juggle complex business tasks such as managing brand deals, tracking deadlines, invoicing, and payment follow-ups, frequently relying on scattered tools like spreadsheets and em...

item.title: Armed suspect arrested after shooting incident disrupts White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: US President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were evacuated from the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington after an armed man opened fire near a security checkpoint. A...

item.title: West Coast Eagles suffer heavy 101-point loss to St Kilda as structural issues persist
item.description: West Coast endured another tough outing, going down to St Kilda by 101 points at Marvel Stadium in a performance that highlighted ongoing structural and execution issues. While a controversial second-...

item.title: How security operated during the White House Correspondents’ dinner incident
item.description: A shooting incident linked to the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner has raised renewed scrutiny over security arrangements at high-profile political events in the United States. Authoriti...

item.title: Armed suspect fires near White House correspondents dinner; Trump and officials unharmed
item.description: Nagkaroon ng tensyon at kaguluhan sa taunang White House Correspondents’ Association dinner sa Washington, D.C. noong Abril 25, 2026, matapos ang isang armadong lalaki na may dalang shotgun ay tangkan...

item.title: Donald Trump and Guests Evacuated Safely After Shooting Incident at White House Dinner
item.description: On Saturday night, April 25, panic erupted at the Washington Hilton during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner when a gunman opened fire. Despite heavy security, President Donald Trump, First Lady,...

item.title: Shooting Incident at White House Dinner: Trump Reacts to Attack
item.description: During the White House Correspondents' Association dinner on April 25, 2026, President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were quickly evacuated by Secret Service after a man opened fire on sec...

item.title: Obasanjo Warns Lawmakers Against Deciding Their Own Salaries
item.description: Former President Olusegun Obasanjo don yan strong against members of the National Assembly over di mata wey dem dey try decide their own salaries. For interview wey he give News Central on Saturday, A...

item.title: Leaders denounce disruptions during Welcome to Country at Anzac Day services
item.description: Senior political figures, Indigenous leaders and military officials across Australia have strongly condemned incidents of booing that disrupted Welcome to Country and Acknowledgement of Country ceremo...

item.title: Manly’s Olakau'atu reacts angrily after being placed on report for high shot
item.description: Manly forward Haumole Olakau'atu showed visible frustration during an NRL match after being placed on report for a high tackle, an incident that drew attention both on and off the field. Following the...

item.title: Hamilton Police Obtain Court Order to Identify Teen Suspect in Fatal Jackson Square Shooting
item.description: Hamilton police have secured a court order to identify a 14-year-old boy wanted in connection with a fatal shooting at Jackson Square Mall in Hamilton. The incident resulted in the death of a teenage ...

item.title: Authorities Investigate Residence of Suspect in White House Correspondents' Dinner Shooting

item.title: Kieswetter reflects on rebuilding Sars and strengthening South Africa’s fiscal stability
item.description: In his farewell reflection, outgoing Sars commissioner Edward Kieswetter argues that the success of the South African Revenue Service rests not only on strong financial results but on the integrity an...

item.title: NAF Conducts Intelligence-Led Airstrikes on Insurgent Hideouts in Tumbuns Area
item.description: The Nigerian Air Force (NAF) carry out targeted airstrikes on April 24 for Ali Sheriffti area, wey be known insurgent stronghold for the southern Tumbuns region of North-East Nigeria. According to off...

item.title: Mississippi Middle School Students Safely Stop Bus After Driver's Asthma Attack
item.description: A group of about 40 students from Hancock Middle School in Mississippi heroically intervened when their bus driver, 46-year-old Leah Taylor, suffered a severe asthma attack and lost consciousness shor...
